g.text: calls MCP tools over stdio · PROJECT_PATH env var scopes memory to this repo
add_insight is also called directly by Claude inline during a session — no hook needed
all communication over stdio · prepared statements + WAL mode · no ORM
WRITE: embed(title + body) → insert vector into insight_vec virtual table
QUERY: embed(search_term) → KNN cosine distance lookup · fallback to SQL LIKE if unavailable
insight_vec (sqlite-vec virtual table · 384-dim float32 vectors · KNN cosine similarity)
reindex_insights backfills embeddings for insights written before vector search was added
hooks fire → inject instructions into session context via stdout / additionalContext JSON
